brain.commentary: Mixed slate: index longs (SPY/QQQ/DIA) plus AAPL/GOOGL are constructive but conviction is only moderate (0.54-0.61), while single-name mega-cap tech (MSFT, META, TSLA, NVDA) shows negative alpha and elevated vol, and crypto is uniformly weak (composites -0.32 to -0.48, high vol, deeply negative alpha). Fragile signals flagged: NVDA (beta ~1.9, vol 0.37, negative alpha), TSLA (beta ~2.0, vol 0.44), META and MSFT (alpha < -0.5), and all four crypto pairs (SOL/USD worst). QQQ long carries embedded exposure to the same weak mega-caps, so its adjustment is tempered despite the highest conviction. A
